top_issues.title: TypeScript Compilation Error - motion/react module not found

issues.title: TypeScript Compilation Error
issues.description: Cannot find module 'motion/react' causing TypeScript compilation to fail

issues.title: ESLint Not Configured
issues.description: ESLint configuration is missing, no code quality checks running
evidence: npm run lint prompts for configuration
issues.suggested_patch: Run npm run lint and choose 'Strict (recommended)' or create .eslintrc.json manually

issues.title: Excessive Font Weight Loading
issues.description: Loading all 7 font weights (300-900) when only a few are needed, increasing bundle size by ~200-300KB
issues.suggested_patch: Reduce to only needed weights (e.g., 400, 600, 700) and add display: 'swap'

issues.title: Heavy Animation Libraries Impacting Bundle Size
issues.description: Multiple large animation libraries (GSAP ~50KB, Three.js ~150KB, Framer Motion ~30KB) significantly impact bundle size
evidence: package.json includes gsap, three, @react-three/fiber, framer-motion, motion
issues.suggested_patch: Tree-shake GSAP plugins, remove duplicate motion library, lazy load Three.js (already done for Beams)

issues.title: Missing Security Headers
issues.description: No security headers configured (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, etc.)
issues.suggested_patch: Add headers() function to next.config.mjs with security headers

issues.title: Minimal SEO Metadata
issues.description: Only basic title and description. Missing Open Graph, Twitter Cards, structured data
evidence: app/layout.tsx metadata only has title and description
issues.suggested_patch: Add comprehensive metadata including openGraph, twitter, robots, keywords

issues.title: Missing Viewport Meta Tag
issues.description: Viewport meta tag not explicitly configured, may cause mobile rendering issues

issues.title: Missing Image Optimization
issues.description: Some images use unoptimized prop or lack proper sizes attributes
issues.suggested_patch: Remove unoptimized prop, add proper sizes attributes

issues.title: Missing Font Preloading
issues.description: Critical fonts not preloaded, causing FOIT (Flash of Invisible Text)
evidence: app/layout.tsx font config lacks preload and display options
issues.suggested_patch: Add display: 'swap' and preload: true to font config

issues.title: Duplicate Animation Libraries
issues.description: Both framer-motion and motion packages installed, serving same purpose

issues.title: Missing Alt Text for Some Images
issues.description: Some images have empty alt text fallback
evidence: components/LogoLoop.tsx:296 uses empty string as fallback

issues.title: Language Attribute May Be Incorrect
issues.description: HTML lang set to 'en' but content appears to be in Mongolian
evidence: app/layout.tsx:27 has lang='en' but content is Mongolian

issues.title: Missing Structured Data
issues.description: No JSON-LD structured data for Organization or WebSite schema
evidence: No structured data found in layout
issues.suggested_patch: Add JSON-LD script with Organization schema

issues.title: Fixed Height Values May Cause Issues
issues.description: Sections use fixed viewport heights that may cause issues on different screen sizes
evidence: app/Sections/Hero.tsx uses h-[86vh], app/Sections/Bento.tsx uses h-[124vh]
issues.suggested_patch: Use min-height instead of fixed height

issues.title: Missing Focus Management in Animations
issues.description: Complex animations may trap keyboard focus or not properly manage focus during transitions

issues.title: Missing Bundle Analysis
issues.description: No bundle analysis configured to track bundle size over time

ci_checks.name: Lint
ci_checks.description: Run ESLint to check code quality
